branch.conclusion: Raise ValueError at __init__. Do not allow service instantiation.
Merge caller metadata onto every chunk. Stamp strategy_used == requested_strategy. Return envelope with warnings=[].
Run word-split fallback. Stamp strategy_used="fallback". Emit warnings entry with source + exception. Apply r5-strategy-used-in-output.

example.p: Batch ingest of docs/*.md with Strategy.MARKDOWN. One malformed file triggers fallback → warning logged → operator triages → re-ingest after fix.
